hero.headline: The *fix-it crew* Tallahassee calls first
hero.subheadline: TV mounting, garage storage, bathroom remodels — we show up on time and get it done right

services_section.label: WHAT WE FIX
services_section.heading: From small repairs to full remodels
services_section.subheading: No project too big or small for our Tallahassee team

services.title: TV Mounting & Electronics Setup
services.description: Wall-mounted TVs that stay put and move smoothly. All angles covered, all wires hidden, zero wobble guaranteed.

services.title: Bathroom Remodeling
services.description: Complete bathroom makeovers from tile to fixtures. We handle the mess so you get the results without the headache.

services.title: Garage Storage Solutions
services.description: Overhead racks, wall systems, and organized storage that actually works. Get your garage back and your car inside.

services.title: General Home Repairs
services.description: Squeaky hinges, loose handles, patched drywall — all the little things that make your house feel like home again.

services.title: Installation Services
services.description: Shelving, fixtures, appliances, and anything else that needs mounting, connecting, or setting up properly.

about.heading: Built on getting it right the first time
about.body: C3 Handyman Services has earned 14 five-star reviews by showing up when we say we will and finishing what we start. From TV mounting to full bathroom remodels, we guide you through every step and deliver work that lasts. Tallahassee homeowners know they can count on us.

reviews.name: Shachrisa B.
reviews.text: Mounted all three TVs perfectly — sturdy, adjustable, and exactly what I wanted. Definitely calling them again.

reviews.name: Noah G.
reviews.text: Professional and efficient. The owner walked me through each step and completed everything on time.

reviews.name: Trey W.
reviews.text: Excellent work installing garage storage racks. Great quality, fair price, and I'll definitely use them again.

reviews.name: Jack J.
reviews.text: Exceptional professionalism from quote to completion. The bathroom remodel came out remarkable.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Tallahassee and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Quick response times throughout Leon County

cta.heading: Ready to get that project finished?
cta.body: Call C3 Handyman Services today for a quick quote. We'll walk you through the work and get started when you're ready.
